nasb.text: just as He says also in another passage, “You are a priest forever According to the order of Melchizedek.”

esv.text: as he says also in another place, “You are a priest forever, after the order of Melchizedek.”

cnv.text: 就像他在另一處說： “你是照著麥基洗德的體系， 永遠作祭司的。”

ccb.text: 在圣经的另一处，上帝又说： “你照麦基洗德的模式永远做祭司。”

csbs.text: 正如在另外一处也说：“你是照着麦基洗德的等级做祭司，直到永远。”
